allowed_content: sparse pencil marks with one visual center
visual_center: one ordered cluster of short handwriting clues
composition_mode: single clean paper surface with controlled spacing

paper_policy.cleanliness: white, clean, not yellowed, not aged, not archival

style_policy.line_quality: slightly crooked pencil and ballpoint lines, imperfect but controlled

repair_policy.on_failure: remove people, scenes, symbol sheets, and long body text
